tasks.label: Run Landing Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'source .worktree-ports 2>/dev/null || true; cd packages/landing; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${LANDING_PORT:-4000} --strictPort'

tasks.label: Run App Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'source .worktree-ports 2>/dev/null || true; cd packages/app; PORT="${AUTH_PAGES_PORT:-${APP_PORT:-3001}}"; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --strictPort'

tasks.label: Run Example-basic Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'source .worktree-ports 2>/dev/null || true; cd examples/example-basic; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${EXAMPLE_BASIC_PORT:-38110} --strictPort'

tasks.label: Run Example-multi-room Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'source .worktree-ports 2>/dev/null || true; cd examples/example-multi-room; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${EXAMPLE_MULTI_ROOM_PORT:-38120} --strictPort'

tasks.label: Run Example-interop-notes Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'source .worktree-ports 2>/dev/null || true; cd examples/example-interop-notes; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${EXAMPLE_INTEROP_NOTES_PORT:-38130} --strictPort'

tasks.label: Run Example-interop-flashcards Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'source .worktree-ports 2>/dev/null || true; cd examples/example-interop-flashcards; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${EXAMPLE_INTEROP_FLASHCARDS_PORT:-38140} --strictPort'

tasks.label: Ewe-note Dev
